evals.name: level-judgment
evals.prompt: 判断规范等级: 用户请求 '修复登录页面一个 typo'
expectations: Should judge as Level 1 (Skip) for trivial fix
Should explain why Level 1 was chosen

evals.name: bilingual-support
evals.prompt: 双语输入处理: 'Add a dark mode feature / 添加深色模式功能' — 请生成英文 proposal
expectations: Should correctly parse mixed Chinese/English input
Should generate proposal content in English as requested
Should preserve the feature intent from both language inputs
